name: Mehul Vaidya
summary: Result-driven Team Lead with 9+ years of experience leading software development, data analytics, and AI/ML initiatives across BFSI and tech sectors. Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams, deliver complex projects, and drive business outcomes. Strong background in backend systems, BI, automation, and client engagement. M.Tech. in Computer Science from IIT Kharagpur. PMP certified.

work_experience.description: Improved order lifecycle performance by 30–40% through backend modernization in Citi Equity Trading systems. Reduced production latency diagnosis time by 50%+ by leading Python-based automation. Accelerated release cycles by 25% by migrating deployments to OpenShift and enforcing Agile delivery. Developed ML model improving trade validation accuracy by 35% and reducing failed orders by 20%.

Managed BI development for 6+ enterprise clients including Microsoft and Empirix. Delivered Microsoft IPCosell BI solution managing $1B+ pipeline and reduced manual effort by 90%. Led ML/NLP-based fraud detection and sales prediction features. Acted as liaison between technical teams and business stakeholders.

projects.description: Stock exchange simulation where four stocks are traded and settlement is handled using a priority queue.

projects.project_name: Enterprise-Grade RAG Platform for Financial Data (SEC 10-K)
projects.description: End-to-end RAG system for querying SEC 10-K filings using FAISS, cross-encoder reranking, and local LLM with citations.
System where LLM agents generate, verify, and execute SQL queries from natural language, with reporting and trace logging.
